name: toybox
title: ToyBox
description: 聚合常用开发小工具的 Raycast 扩展
author: hongmenke

commands.name: toybox
commands.title: ToyBox
commands.description: 打开 ToyBox 工具中心

commands.name: json
commands.title: 格式化 JSON
commands.description: 在 Raycast 中以树形结构浏览任意 JSON 文本

commands.name: mybatis
commands.title: 格式化 MyBatis SQL
commands.description: 将 MyBatis 日志行转换为可执行的 SQL

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the `prepublishOnly` script and rerun `npm publish` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use `npm run publish` instead.

" && exit 1
